# Phase 26: Category Detail + PLAN мая + Subscriptions — Context

**Gathered:** 2026-05-10
**Status:** Ready for planning
**Mode:** Auto-generated by autonomous orchestrator (discuss-phase skipped — ROADMAP success_criteria + REQUIREMENTS.md detail used directly as spec; Phase 25 patterns established for routing/components/API).

<domain>
## Phase Boundary

User получает три экрана для управления бюджетом:

1. **Category Detail** — push-stack экран на cobalt-фоне (red если `isOver`); Mass UPPERCASE имя, italic подзаголовок («— превышено на N%» / «— на N% плана»), BigFig факт с count-up; progress bar 6px с разрывом на отметке плана; rollover-toggle plate; CTA-row «+ ПОДНЯТЬ ЛИМИТ» (push PLAN с focus param) / «ПАУЗА» (toggle `category.paused`); список операций по этой категории.

2. **PLAN мая** — расширенный экран на cobalt-фоне; eyebrow «MGMT / LIMITS», Mass «PLAN МЕСЯЦА.»; plate «ОСТАЛОСЬ РАСПРЕДЕЛИТЬ» (`income − Σplan`) с OK/OVER состоянием (OVER блокирует submit); 2 rollover-плашки «→ ПРОЧЕЕ X ₽» / «→ НАКОПЛЕНИЯ Y ₽»; block «РЕГУЛЯРНЫЕ · ПРОВЕСТИ В ФАКТ» с post/unpost кнопками; 8 sliders (шаг 500₽, debounce 300ms, tap по числу → keyboard input); chip-pair «ПРОЧЕЕ / НАКОПЛЕНИЯ» меняет rollover per category; single PATCH endpoint валидирует `Σplan ≤ income` server-side.

3. **Subscriptions** — экран на coral-фоне; Mass italic «Подписки.» + BigFig «X ₽/мес» + eyebrow «N АКТИВНЫХ · Y ₽ В ГОД»; список подписок name UPPER · «каждое N число» · price · `···`; bottom-sheet menu с 3 ghost-кнопками (ПАУЗА toggle, СМЕНИТЬ ДЕНЬ → secondary sheet DatePicker, ИЗМЕНИТЬ ЦЕНУ → secondary sheet numeric input) + destructive «ОТМЕНИТЬ ПОДПИСКУ» (red фон) → confirm → DELETE.

</domain>

<decisions>
## Implementation Decisions

### Locked from Phase 25 patterns (do NOT re-discuss)
- **Routing**: web `PosterRouter` + iOS `PosterNavStack` (Phase 25 plan 25-02/05). Push routes from Home: `router.push(<CategoryDetail catId={id}/>)`, `router.push(<PlanMonth focus={catId}/>)`, `router.push(<Subscriptions/>)`.
- **Sheets**: web `PosterSheet` + iOS `.posterSheet` modifier (Phase 25 plan 25-02/06). Subscriptions bottom-sheet menu uses PosterSheet primary; secondary day/price editor sheets stack via PosterSheet (web supports stacking; iOS uses sheet-on-sheet pattern from Phase 23 ADR).
- **API clients**: web `frontend/src/api/v10/categories.ts` + iOS `CategoriesV10API` (Phase 25 plan 25-03). Already have v1.0 fields (code/plan_cents/ord/rollover/paused/parent_id) on the wire from Phase 25 fix `eb7192e`.
- **Backend**: PATCH /categories/:id (Phase 22 BE-04), PATCH /plan-month single endpoint (Phase 22 BE-08), DELETE /subscriptions/:id (Phase 22 SUBS).
- **Money**: BIGINT cents on the wire (CLAUDE.md §Conventions). Sliders mutate `plan_cents` directly (step = 50000 = 500₽).
- **Components**: BigFig (Plan 25-02), Mass, Eyebrow, Plate (Phase 23 design system), posterBarFill animation (Phase 23).
- **Symmetry**: web ║ iOS plans pair 1:1 (same pattern as Phase 25 — separate plans per platform, same API contract, same UI behavior, same must_haves).

### Open implementation choices (Claude's discretion — typical patterns)
- **Slider primitive**: web — native `<input type="range">` styled per Phase 23 spec; iOS — SwiftUI `Slider` with custom track. Debounced commit via `setTimeout(300)` (web) / `Task.sleep` (iOS).
- **Toast «✓ ПРОВЕДЕНО»**: reuse Toast component from Phase 23. 2.5s autodismiss, tap → push TransactionsView.
- **Confirmation для destructive «ОТМЕНИТЬ ПОДПИСКУ»**: web — `<dialog>` modal с red CTA; iOS — `.alert` с destructive role.
- **Refetch after mutate**: explicit refetch on PATCH/DELETE success (no SWR-style cache invalidation in MVP — same as Phase 25).
- **Slider tap-to-input**: tap на label с числом → modal с numeric keypad (reuse AddSheet Keypad component с min/max constraints).
- **Plan focus param**: PLAN мая принимает `focus?: number` (catId), скроллит к этой категории + opens slider edit popup.
- **Rollover plate aggregation (PLAN-V10-03)**: web/iOS компонент агрегирует `Σ(plan_cents - fact_cents) where rollover === 'misc'` и аналогично для 'savings'.
- **Subscription post/unpost**: backend endpoint `POST /subscriptions/:id/post` / `POST /subscriptions/:id/unpost` (если уже есть в Phase 22 — иначе planner добавит небольшое backend-расширение).

</decisions>

<code_context>
## Existing Code Insights

**Web** (`frontend/src/screensV10/`):
- `common/PosterRouter.tsx`, `common/PosterSheet.tsx`, `common/BottomNavV10.tsx` — shell primitives.
- `common/format.ts` — formatRubles, formatDay, formatPeriodEyebrow.
- `Home/HomeView.tsx`, `Home/HomeMount.tsx` — push routes uses `usePosterRouter().push`.
- `Transactions/TransactionsView.tsx`, `TransactionsMount.tsx` — single-select chip filter pattern.
- `AddSheet/AddSheet.tsx`, `AddSheet/Keypad.tsx` — numeric keypad component (reusable for slider tap-to-input).
- `V10MainShell.tsx` — root composition with FAB binding to AddSheet.
- `api/v10/categories.ts`, `api/v10/actual.ts`, `api/v10/accounts.ts` — typed clients.

**iOS** (`ios/BudgetPlanner/FeaturesV10/`):
- `Common/V10Formatters.swift`, `Common/BottomNavV10.swift` — primitives.
- `Home/HomeV10View.swift`, `HomeViewModel.swift` — pattern for screen-with-VM.
- `Transactions/TransactionsV10View.swift`, `TransactionsV10ViewModel.swift` — list with delete swipe.
- `AddSheet/AddSheetView.swift`, `KeypadView.swift`, `SuppressedKeyboardField.swift` — numeric input pattern.
- `App/V10MainShell.swift` — PosterRouter + BottomNavV10 + AddSheet composition.

**Backend** (`app/api/`):
- `routes/categories.py` — GET/POST/PATCH /categories. v1.0 fields exposed via `CategoryRead` (Phase 25 fix `eb7192e`).
- `routes/subscriptions.py` — GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE /subscriptions (Phase 22). Need to verify if post/unpost endpoints exist.
- `services/plan.py` (or similar) — single PATCH plan-month endpoint (Phase 22 BE-08).

</code_context>

<specifics>
## Specific Ideas

- **Wave structure recommendation** (planner may refine):
  - Wave 1 (backend if needed): subscription post/unpost endpoint (if missing) — small, single plan.
  - Wave 2 (web ║ iOS): Category Detail web + iOS, PLAN мая web + iOS, Subscriptions web + iOS — 6 plans parallel (3 screens × 2 platforms).
  - Wave 3: integration tests + bottom-nav «MGMT» entry (router push to PLAN мая).

- **Each screen plan should include:**
  - Route registration in V10MainShell / posterRouter handlers.
  - Pure compute helpers (separate `compute*.ts` / `*Data.swift` for testability, established Phase 25 pattern).
  - View component (presentation only).
  - Mount/ViewModel (data fetching + mutations).
  - Tests: pure compute helpers (unit) + view (smoke).

</specifics>

<deferred>
## Deferred Ideas

- Real-time slider sync between users (not applicable — single-tenant).
- Bulk subscription import (out of scope).
- Subscription cycle other than monthly (Phase 22 supports yearly; this phase MVP = monthly only — ROADMAP success_criteria #4 says `cycle=monthly`).
- Pixel-perfect easing fidelity → Phase 28 polish.

</deferred>
